function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0007
alias: helios_backfill_process_pack
issued_on: 2026-01-12
total_eur: 760
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: workflow mapping and intake audit
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 260
    line_eur: 260
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 110
    line_eur: 110
---
# Helios process pack invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0007                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_process_pack   |
| issued_on      | 2026-01-12                     |
| total_eur      | 760                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | workflow mapping and intake audit  | 1   | 260      | 260      |
| 2 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 3 | staff follow-up support            | 1   | 110      | 110      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 760      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the middle phase when the work started looking like an actual office deliverable set.

next_step.current_state: Invoice migration write succeeded. Reactive outbox note is not applicable (this was finance record, not outbox). Continue remaining required edits.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write frontmatter to purchase record preserving body verbatim
next_step.observation: First target invoice file was updated via write with schema-compliant frontmatter and preserved body.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox request by running OCR-style frontmatter migration on both requested finance records and then removing the completed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read/context), loaded 99_system workflows/schemas, read nested AGENTS in inbox and finance lanes, preserved original note bodies verbatim under YAML frontmatter, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR two specified finance records. Both target files contained all required visible fields for their schemas (invoice and bill), allowing compliant frontmatter insertion without guessing. After successful updates, inbox-processing rules required deleting the processed inbox item, which was done.
